title: cytisus prostratus var. ciliatus
intro: Cytisus prostratus var. ciliatus, also known as dwarf broom or prostrate broom, is a low-growing, woody shrub native to Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Cytisus prostratus var. ciliatus include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a variety of ailments.
